hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|json|md|css|html|yaml|yml)$' && npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'docs/adr/|docs/CODEMAPS/' && { node tools/architecture/validate-action-register/src/index.mjs >/tmp/cc-areg.log 2>&1 && echo 'governance: validate-action-register OK' || echo 'governance: validate-action-register FAILED — see /tmp/cc-areg.log'; } || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'apps/platform-api/.*(route|usecase|use-case|contract|handler)' && { ( npm run --silent openapi:drift >/tmp/cc-openapi.log 2>&1 & ); echo 'openapi:drift started (bg) -> /tmp/cc-openapi.log'; } || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'apps/react-enterprise-app/.*(admin|auth)/' && { ( npm run --silent frontend:conventions >/tmp/cc-fe.log 2>&1 & ); echo 'frontend:conventions started (bg) -> /tmp/cc-fe.log'; } || true

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(\.env($|\..+)|\.pem$|\.key$|id_rsa|\.p12$|\.pfx$|credentials(\.json)?$|\.tfvars$|\.tfstate)' && echo "$FILE" | grep -qvF '.env.example' && { echo 'BLOCK: refusing to edit secret-bearing path (CLAUDE.md constraint #8)'; exit 2; }; exit 0

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null); echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(rm[[:space:]]+-[a-z]*r[a-z]*f?[[:space:]]+(/|~|\$HOME|\*)|git[[:space:]]+push[[:space:]]+.*--force|git[[:space:]]+reset[[:space:]]+--hard[[:space:]]+origin|mkfs|truncate[[:space:]]+-s[[:space:]]*0)' && { echo 'BLOCK: destructive command — confirm with operator first'; exit 2; }; exit 0
echo 'Reminder: report gate results (make check), evidence updates, ADR/ACTION-REGISTER status, and any deferrals. Do not claim live/prod verification without running the command.'
